rulings.Case Title: DANIEL TARBELL SR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Noto Compel The Deposition Of William H. Harvey Co'S Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian(S) Of Records Or Other Qualified Persons And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFF DANIEL TARBELL's MOTION to Compel The Deposition Of William H. Harvey Co.'S Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian(S) Of Records Or Other Qualified Persons And To Produce Documents At Deposition is continued to February 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. per agreement of parties. =(220/HEK)
